creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
'man pdfpc' on a recent -CURRENT host starts with:

==========
pdfpc(1)                FreeBSD General Commands Manual               pdfpc(1)

URL {.de URL \$2 <URL: \$1 >\$3

NAME
       pdfpc - PDF presenter console with multi-monitor support

SYNOPSIS
       pdfpc [options] PDF-file
==========

Note the "URL {.de URL \$2 ..." on the second line
